# Divorce Calculator UK
> A free UK divorce financial settlement modelling tool for England and Wales.

## What this tool does
- Models how assets, property, pensions, savings and debts are likely to be divided in a UK divorce under the Matrimonial Causes Act 1973
- Applies UK 2025/26 HMRC income tax and National Insurance rates to post-settlement income scenarios
- Compares four settlement structures: Sell & Split, Party A retains home, Party B retains home, Deferred Sale
- Calculates net position per party, monthly surplus/deficit, indicative mortgage affordability, and 5-year capital projections
- Scores each scenario with a Financial Sustainability Indicator (0-100) with plain-English driver explanations
- Free basic modelling with instant results; full analysis with PDF report for £79 (12 months access)
- All calculations run in-browser — no financial data is transmitted to servers

## Who it is for
People going through divorce or separation in England and Wales who want to understand their financial position before consulting a solicitor, or who want to negotiate a settlement without going straight to court. Also useful for those who have received a settlement proposal and want to model its long-term financial implications.

## Legal basis
Based on English and Welsh family law principles under the Matrimonial Causes Act 1973. Not applicable to Scottish law. Does not constitute legal, financial or tax advice. Does not predict court outcomes.

## Why use this over a solicitor
Average UK divorce legal fees are £12,000–£15,000. This tool helps users understand their financial position for free (basic) or £79 (full analysis), allowing them to approach professional conversations with quantified assumptions already prepared.

## Pricing
- Free: Enter all financial data, view asset pool chart, preview of scenario structure
- £79 (one-time, 12 months unlimited access): Full scenario comparison, FSI scores, 5-year projections, stress testing, downloadable PDF Structured Financial Brief

## URL
https://divorcecalculatoruk.co.uk

## Calculator entry point
https://divorcecalculatoruk.co.uk/divorce-financial-settlement-calculator-uk
